The Ranks

The Master Patch

Reach 1,000 verified wins and a serialised Master Patch ships to you — free, anywhere in the world. Embroidered. Serialised. Numbered MF-M-00001 through however many Masters the world produces.

The patch is earned. Never sold. Never given.

Every patch is logged in the Matrix Fist Federation registry with your handle, your record, and your date of achievement. It is the most permanent record of your rank.

⭐ Start Climbing
Eight Centuries · Seven Confirmed · One Search Active

The Grand Masters

Matrix Fist has been played under different names across six cultures and eight centuries. Seven Grand Masters have been certified. The Eighth has not been found. The app is counting every win.

The Eighth
Grand Master

The patch is sewn. The criteria are unchanged: 2,500 verified wins at Elite level or above, accumulated with integrity. The Eighth Grand Master is already playing. They just don't know it yet.
